member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Services.AgentNotifier.DisabledWhatsAppNotifier
member.summary: Null-object implementation registered when WhatsApp is not configured. Ensures the DI container resolves IWhatsAppNotifier without throwing, while making it clear that no messages will be sent.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.AgentNotifier.DisabledWhatsAppNotifier.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Services.AgentNotifier.DisabledWhatsAppNotifier})
member.summary: Null-object implementation registered when WhatsApp is not configured. Ensures the DI container resolves IWhatsAppNotifier without throwing, while making it clear that no messages will be sent.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Services.AgentNotifier.DisabledWhatsAppSender
member.summary: Null-object implementation registered when WhatsApp is not configured. Ensures the DI container resolves IWhatsAppSender without throwing, while making it clear that no messages will be sent.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.AgentNotifier.DisabledWhatsAppSender.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Services.AgentNotifier.DisabledWhatsAppSender})
member.summary: Null-object implementation registered when WhatsApp is not configured. Ensures the DI container resolves IWhatsAppSender without throwing, while making it clear that no messages will be sent.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.AgentNotifier.NotificationHelpers.HashEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a 12-character lowercase hex prefix of the SHA-256 hash of the email address. Trims and lowercases the input so casing differences hash identically. Used for structured logging — never log PII in plain text.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.AgentNotifier.NotificationHelpers.EscapeYaml(System.String)
member.summary: Escapes a string for safe embedding inside a double-quoted YAML scalar. Escapes backslashes first, then double quotes, preventing key injection.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.AgentNotifier.NotificationHelpers.ResolveAccountId(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Models.AccountConfig,System.String)
member.summary: Resolves the accountId from an already-loaded AccountConfig. Falls back to agentId if config is null or has no AccountId set. Use this overload when the caller has already loaded the config for other purposes.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Services.AgentNotifier.NotificationHelpers.ResolveAccountIdAsync(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.Storage.IAccountConfigService,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves the accountId for a given agentId by loading the account config. Falls back to agentId if config is unavailable or has no AccountId set. Use this overload when accountId is the only value needed from the config.
